text:
was an social mobile game created by Sphere Enterprises Co., Ltd. In collaboration with Copro, based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. It was released on mobile phone platform GREE, it worked in the models that were compatible with au, NTT Docomo and SoftBank. The service started on 04 August 2010 and it closed in an unclear date. https://w.atwiki.jp/gamebiz_database/pages/78.html https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000001.000002497.html 

Overview

In the game, the player became the chief protection supervisor who had to train the Evangelion pilots, and annihilate the Angels. Cooperation from allies was essential to defeating the A.T. Field of a powerful Angel. The players had to deepen their bonds through daily communication and mock battles with their friends.

It was a free to play and pay per item monetization model. It won one of the Outstanding Performance Award of the "GREE Platform Award 2010". https://corp.gree.net/jp/ja/news/press/2011/0224-04.html
